idea.title: Smelter Tycoon
idea.hook: Tap the furnace to smelt ore into gold, buy auto-smelters, and climb the metal tiers — but keep the heat down or the whole foundry melts down.
idea.hook_ru: Жми печь, чтобы плавить руду в золото, покупай автоплавильни и поднимайся по металлам — но следи за жаром, иначе вся плавильня перегреется.
idea.prototype: Active-incremental idle tycoon: tap a glowing furnace to smelt the current metal tier into coins; buy auto-smelters (passive coins/sec), Tap Power, Coin Value, Coolant, and unlock 8 metal tiers (each ×4 value). Heat from taps + running smelters drives a meltdown lose condition. Late-run Reforge-the-Core in-run ascension grants permanent Core Shard output multipliers. Endless score = total coins this run; lose by foundry meltdown.
idea.mutation_of: idle_tycoon archetype (Firestone/Drift Tycoon/Plinko Idle) × our merge-economy retention proof (beast_bazaar 235s/play)
idea.why_novel: first growth-idle/incremental in the portfolio; heat-meltdown gives active pressure + a real lose condition; in-run Core ascension introduces a new currency + multiplier layer late in the run
idea.lose_condition: foundry meltdown at critical heat (heat at/over heatMax for critGrace=3s, OR a smelt/tick overshoots heatMax+meltdownMargin=120) → gs='GAMEOVER'; reachable from random tap-spam in ~7-40s with no coolant

sources.title: Merge Dale
sources.snippet: merge-economy grossing reference; our portfolio already saturated merge (6 games), so this build deliberately fills the UNBUILT growth-idle gap instead — the genre with the highest retention ceiling for us

synthesizer_brief: Portfolio-gap pick for the 2026-05-31 pm run. SIGNAL: idle_tycoon is the #2 CTR archetype on Yandex/CrazyGames today (weight 3985), behind only merge which we've saturated with 6 games. KNOWLEDGE: our highest-retention genre is the merge/economy family (235s/play, beast_bazaar); idle/incremental shares that economic depth but is UNBUILT for us — the gap with the highest ceiling. North-star for this build: an addictive 10-minute CORE LOOP only (TTFF<15s, a new tier/mechanic every 1-2 min, late Reforge ascension), with heat→meltdown as the non-timer pressure mirroring beast_bazaar's proven spam-fail / skill-survives structure. Cross-session retention (offline earnings, persistent prestige, daily quests) deliberately deferred to the iteration ladder.
